title: FlameVPack
description: 综合功能、体验、外观、辅助、优化于一体的原版整合包 —— A vanilla modpack that integrates functionality, experience, appearance, assistance, and optimization
body:
## 简体中文

你喜欢捣鼓小玩意吗？还是喜欢折腾细节？又或者是，厌烦于更新著名的整合包后又要自己添加喜欢的其他模组？

这个整合包也许适合你！

### 简介

- 我在最近一年内游玩各个整合包的过程中，收集了所发现的有趣的、实用的...没错就是**功能、体验、外观、辅助、优化类**的模组，根据它们对原版的辅助或修改、相互间的功能进行选用或更改它们的设置（比如对目的相同的模组就保留功能上更多、使用上更舒服、稳定性更好的），以获得最优的**游戏体验**和**视觉效果**。

- 你可以阅览此整合包的[说明书](https://www.bilibili.com/opus/929491958668197889)（即侧边栏 Wiki 链接），进行一些针对你个性的设置，比如**开关/增删模组/资源包/光影**。当然了，如果你想知道某些功能的如何工作的也可以**查阅说明书**或者**访问模组的网站**来阅读说明。

### 注明

- **如果无法启动，请首先关闭 Mod Looading Screen 模组（如果有的话）再试**（仍有问题可以在左侧 **Issue** 链接联系我反馈）

- 请注意认准游戏与整合包的版本号，例如 `1.20.2 v1` 与 `1202.1` 一致，而与 `1201.2` 等不一致

- 这是一个类原版整合包！所以不包含对游戏内容修改的模组（我叫它们 “内容模组” ，比如添加了新方块、新生物的模组），你当然可以加入有趣的内容模组或者将这个整合包与其他整合包合并游玩，不过它们模组的重复性和兼容性就需要你自己来操心了。 lol

## English

Do you like tinkering with gadgets? Or do you like to toss about details? Or, tired of updating the famous modpack and then updating other mods you like by yourself?

This modpack is for you!

### Introduction

- During playing various modpack in the last year, I collected interesting and practical mods ... that is, **functionality, experience, appearance, assistance, and optimization**, and selected or changed their settings according to their assistance or modification to the game and their mutual functions (for example, mods with the same purpose were kept with more functions, more comfortable to use and more stable) to obtain the **best game experience**.

- You can have a look at [Wiki page](https://www.bilibili.com/opus/929491958668197889)(Sorry for no energy to translate Wiki page to English right now, you can turn to translate tools) and make some settings for your personality, such as **switch/add/delete mods/resourcepacks/shaders**.  Of course, if you want to know how some functions work, you can also **visit the mod website**.

### Tips

- **If it can't launch, first disable Mod Loading Screen (If there is) and try again**

- Please pay attention to the version number of the game and modpack, for example, `1.20.2 v1` equals `1202.1`, but not `1201.2`, etc

- The language of this pack was set to Chinese Simplified，you may set to others and disable/remove the following resourcepacks for Chinese translation. (If there is)
  - `FlameVPack补充汉化.zip`
  - `Minecraft-Mod-Language-Modpack-Converted-xxx.zip`
 
  Also disable/remove the following mods. (If there is)
  - `IMBlocker` (If you don't use an input method)
  - `IMBlockerFabric` (Same as above, input method)
  - `I18nUpdateMod`
  - `Just Enough Characters`

- It's a vanilla modpack! So it doesn't include mods that modify the game content (I call them "content mods", such as mods that add new blocks or creatures). Of course, you can add interesting content mods or add this modpack to other modpacks to play, then you might need to take care on their mods' duplicatablity and compatibility by yourself.
